stemHtml: Which of the following processes is the most important one concerning the heating of the air in the troposphere? The radiation of the sun heats..

options.a: the air in the troposphere only directly if no clouds are present.
options.b: the surface of the earth, which heats the air in the troposphere.
options.c: mainly the water vapour that heats the air of the troposphere by conduction.
options.d: the main part of the air in the troposphere by absorption.
